quality.rationale: 线性化能量动量守恒推导波动方程，结合相对论物态方程导出声速公式，逻辑链条完整且具有明确的天体物理应用场景

origin.question: Problem 5.22. Show that the velocity of sound $\mathbf{v}_{\mathbf{s}}$ in a relativistic perfect fluid is given by$$v_{s}^{2} = \left. \partial p / \partial \rho\right|_{s = c o n s t a n t}.$$For a high temperature relativistic gas with an equation of state $\rho \approx 3\mathrm{P}$ (essentially that for a photon gas) show that $\mathbf{v}_{\mathrm{s}} \approx 1 / \sqrt{3}$ .
origin.solution:
Solution 5.22. Assume that the acoustical wave is a perturbation (isentropic) in a uniform static fluid with parameters $ho_0, \mathbf{P}_0$ , and $\mathfrak{n}_0$ . Let the perturbations be $ho_1, \mathbf{P}_1$ , and $\mathfrak{n}_1$ and the fluid velocity be $\mathbf{u} \approx (1, \underline{
u}_1)$ in the rest frame of the unperturbed fluid. The first order perturbation terms in $\mathrm{T}_{,
u}^{\mu 
u} = 0$ give us(i) From $\mu = 0$ $
abla \cdot \underline{\mathbf{v}}_1 = - rac{\partialho_1}{\partial t} (ho_0 + \mathbf{P}_0)^{-1}$   (ii) From $\mu = 1,2,3$which can be combined into$$\partial^{2} ho_{1} / \partial t^{2} - 
abla^{2} \mathbf {P_{1}} = 0 .$$Since $\mathbf{P}_1$ and $ho_1$ are related for isentropic flow by$$\mathbf {P_{\lambda_{1}}} = \left. \partial \mathbf {P} / \partial hoight|_{\mathbf {s}} ho_{\lambda_{1}} ,$$the above equation becomes a wave equation$$
abla^{2} ho_{1} -  rac {1} {v_{\mathrm {s}}^{2}}  rac {\partial^{2} ho_{1}} {\partial t^{2}} = 0$$with characteristic velocity $\mathbf{v}_{\mathrm{s}}$For an equation of state $ho \approx 3\mathbb{P}$$$v_{s}^{2} = \partial P / \partial ho = 1 / 3$$so that $\mathbf{v_s} \approx 3^{- rac{1}{2}}$ in a highly relativistic gas.
